case_title: LETESA BRUCE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRUCE, LETESA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ORDINANCE REQUIRES HOMEOWNERS TO MAINTAIN SEWERS AND PIPES ON THEIR PROPERTY. HERE THE PARTIES AGREE THAT PLAINTIFF HAD LEGACY CLAY PIPES. SUCH PIPES ARE VULNERABLE TO ROOT INTRUSTION. I FIND THAT PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO UPGRADE HER LEGACY PIPES CAUSED HER DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BRUCE, LETESA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE; $40.00) SERVED NOV-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF LETESA BRUCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MS.GRACE GLENN CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
